Now, a rescue mission led by Captain Jaxon Lee must navigate the treacherous landscape of Xylophia-IV to uncover the truth behind the outpost's silence. But as they delve deeper into the mystery, they begin to realize that the fate of the colony may be inextricably linked to an ancient alien artifact hidden deep within the planet's core.
